frontmatter.title: Connectivity
frontmatter.description: Connect LoongClaw to LLM providers and communication channels

html:
Connectivity

The Connectivity pillar focuses on how LoongClaw communicates with the outside world—both with AI models and with users.

In this section:

  • LLM Providers: Configure connections to OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Kimi, Gemini, and more.
  • Channels: Set up communication channels like Telegram, Feishu (Lark), and the CLI.
